title: Classic cards
description: Playing cards and poker chips! Which are meant to be played with friends.
body:
![CardModel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEggs/Modrinth/main/classiccards/cover1_42T.png)
## Description
**Classic cards** - This resource pack adds playing cards and poker chips. You can play card games with your friends and place bets!

![GameCard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEggs/Modrinth/main/classiccards/2025-07-06_23.20.18.png)

- - - -
![Optifine required](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/nFESfBi.png)
This pack uses an OptiFine feature called CIT Resewn.
- - - -
